title: Inflation, not Iran
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week:
Escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have not significantly worried investment markets, as historically they have had little long-term impact on risk assets. Our attention would rather focus on rising tensions inside central banks, with some voices calling for rate cuts. However, rising energy prices will probably give more ammunition to central bankers who feel that maintaining rates at the current levels, instead of lowering them, is the right thing to do for now.
